title: Exam Creator — Single-File Gamified Study Apps
description: Generate single-file, self-contained HTML exam / study / quiz apps for kids and general study. Gamified (XP, levels, badges) with localStorage progress and continue-where-you-left-off, four question types (multiple choice, true/false, numeric with tolerance, short fill-in), immediate feedback + explanations, and optional Hebrew TTS readout that degrades silently. Hebrew RTL by default (LTR/other languages supported), mobile-first, accessible, formulas without MathJax/KaTeX. Runs offline by double-click or Netlify Drop with zero dependencies — the packaged version of the apps in exam-hub-grekai.netlify.app. Never fabricates graded answers without flagging them for review.
